title: Tablet Ajaib Mbok Tun
theme: Kisah seorang penjual jamu senior di pasar tradisional yang dipaksa beradaptasi dengan perangkat teknologi baru, menemukan humor dan tantangan dalam rutinitasnya.

cover.prompt: A vibrant traditional Indonesian market scene, bathed in the soft glow of golden hour. Focus on a well-arranged jamu seller's stall, showcasing an array of colorful artisanal bottles and fragrant natural herbs on a rustic wooden counter. A sleek, modern smart tablet sits prominently among the traditional wares, creating a visual contrast. Warm, filtering sunlight illuminates the textures and colors, with a gentle bokeh effect subtly blurring the lively market activity in the background. The composition highlights the peaceful juxtaposition of old traditions meeting new technology, evoking a sense of gentle transition.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Mbok Tun, a traditional jamu seller, reluctantly adopts a 'smart tablet' for her stall. The device's glitches and frustrating features, like misnaming ingredients and playing loud dangdut music during peak hours, disrupt her routine. In a moment of crisis, Mbok Tun cleverly bypasses the tablet for manual transactions, earning praise from customers. She eventually finds a compromise, using the tablet for basic scanning while relying on her trusted manual system for actual payments.
meta.target_emotion: Amusement and a touch of nostalgic reflection on technological adaptation.
